N:=59;

        + (28*x^47 + 1078*x^46 + 6208*x^45 - 6585*x^44 + 37141*x^43 + 177646*x^42 - 687547*x^41 + 1431437*x^40 - 669893*x^39 - 8671201*x^38 + 21900823*x^37 - 45898261*x^36 + 11878754*x^35 + 67262347*x^34 - 216466666*x^33 +384991554*x^32 - 88380002*x^31 + 83727166*x^30 + 824316646*x^29 - 636188049*x^28 + 41518819*x^27 - 631045432*x^26 - 2244852074*x^25 - 694951368*x^24 - 374685232*x^23 + 388261368*x^22 + 4306492456*x^21 + 2230428336*x^20 + 3252643154*x^19 + 247076539*x^18 - 2104404437*x^17 - 2445553217*x^16 - 3253603357*x^15 - 1671856100*x^14 - 1324680407*x^13 - 534302095*x^12 - 307865547*x^11 + 161876732*x^10 + 637674881*x^9 + 1018192967*x^8 + 1087503480*x^7 + 877734385*x^6 + 547411242*x^5 + 264866004*x^4 + 96973986*x^3 + 25502313*x^2 + 4350164*x + 352716)*y^19
        - (x^48 + 82*x^47 + 979*x^46 + 716*x^45 + 1726*x^44 + 51546*x^43 - 102580*x^42 + 103094*x^41 + 571665*x^40 - 3361236*x^39 + 5667833*x^38 - 7047834*x^37 - 16220672*x^36 + 52931735*x^35 - 105264551*x^34 + 111043975*x^33 + 72357970*x^32 - 175835567*x^31 + 627013089*x^30 - 290276578*x^29 + 176428291*x^28 + 137394717*x^27 - 1225364094*x^26 - 670041346*x^25 - 929237585*x^24 - 1115931563*x^23 + 1357159887*x^22 + 1859881175*x^21 + 2642957136*x^20 + 3323941591*x^19 + 312816238*x^18 - 339633640*x^17 - 3040817873*x^16 - 3240492907*x^15 - 2933806465*x^14 - 1892186587*x^13 - 527167374*x^12 + 340505414*x^11 + 981057705*x^10 + 1164228329*x^9 + 1138985765*x^8 + 923643571*x^7 + 643893202*x^6 + 374385898*x^5 + 177674871*x^4 + 66043164*x^3 + 18016617*x^2 + 3255840*x + 293930)*y^18
        + (3*x^48 + 78*x^47 + 261*x^46 + 50*x^45 + 7498*x^44 - 1866*x^43 - 15789*x^42 + 196545*x^41 - 622494*x^40 + 476010*x^39 + 839775*x^38 - 9192726*x^37 + 17663268*x^36 - 23488428*x^35 - 3555375*x^34 + 92233694*x^33 - 148951841*x^32 + 274762068*x^31 - 5177179*x^30 - 73531100*x^29 + 485062248*x^28 - 631150354*x^27 - 136670387*x^26 - 576445209*x^25 - 1101092942*x^24 - 221423713*x^23 + 458082285*x^22 + 958759530*x^21 + 2708937330*x^20 + 1860523329*x^19 + 1308962474*x^18 - 279308573*x^17 - 2438701980*x^16 - 2853113689*x^15 - 3200347625*x^14 - 1827613269*x^13 - 597056276*x^12 + 657165995*x^11 + 1250519397*x^10 + 1344470196*x^9 + 1100782989*x^8 + 758226492*x^7 + 453092477*x^6 + 237180670*x^5 + 106131834*x^4 + 39103026*x^3 + 10932258*x^2 + 2063970*x + 203490)*y^17
        - (3*x^48 + 22*x^47 + 19*x^46 + 670*x^45 + 1080*x^44 - 2058*x^43 + 28074*x^42 - 44641*x^41 - 74720*x^40 + 519862*x^39 - 2116134*x^38 + 2321095*x^37 + 162985*x^36 - 14584911*x^35 + 40412968*x^34 - 46823925*x^33 + 46627169*x^32 + 103715927*x^31 - 152101729*x^30 + 347100620*x^29 - 193228065*x^28 - 78085297*x^27 + 28288807*x^26 - 756638839*x^25 - 266463699*x^24 - 310894511*x^23 - 38011746*x^22 + 950220568*x^21 + 1478508476*x^20 + 1338086098*x^19 + 1334075586*x^18 - 432023992*x^17 - 1359229917*x^16 - 2458792290*x^15 - 2492385790*x^14 - 1617204231*x^13 - 524214631*x^12 + 625991629*x^11 + 1142379450*x^10 + 1224407763*x^9 + 938789506*x^8 + 595831449*x^7 + 313898897*x^6 + 144587256*x^5 + 57903716*x^4 + 20150184*x^3 + 5651208*x^2 + 1100784*x + 116280)*y^16
        + (x^48 - 2*x^47 + 49*x^46 + 92*x^45 + 16*x^44 + 2982*x^43 - 514*x^42 - 11950*x^41 + 77435*x^40 - 209699*x^39 - 101782*x^38 + 1157204*x^37 - 4582019*x^36 + 7603343*x^35 - 2274808*x^34 - 11882465*x^33 + 64707223*x^32 - 68340213*x^31 + 103881218*x^30 + 47215247*x^29 - 139983518*x^28 + 228513751*x^27 - 356128474*x^26 - 124210237*x^25 - 192148328*x^24 - 367825314*x^23 + 123861665*x^22 + 450910346*x^21 + 691321204*x^20 + 1057219591*x^19 + 670683035*x^18 - 109903269*x^17 - 794471399*x^16 - 1719897635*x^15 - 1618961442*x^14 - 1276735133*x^13 - 363499844*x^12 + 404068037*x^11 + 865005671*x^10 + 926547473*x^9 + 715885431*x^8 + 439854008*x^7 + 217312439*x^6 + 89029076*x^5 + 30763884*x^4 + 9266072*x^3 + 2470152*x^2 + 488376*x + 54264)*y^15
        - (12*x^46 - 40*x^45 + 358*x^44 - 84*x^43 - 228*x^42 + 8760*x^41 - 11157*x^40 - 37946*x^39 + 197009*x^38 - 542760*x^37 + 202162*x^36 + 2190785*x^35 - 6864555*x^34 + 16292155*x^33 - 7166722*x^32 + 66747*x^31 + 68714406*x^30 - 82174623*x^29 + 114155412*x^28 - 50428951*x^27 - 122492513*x^26 + 58604835*x^25 - 302906465*x^24 - 31857601*x^23 - 6971991*x^22 + 132381043*x^21 + 406244117*x^20 + 538418166*x^19 + 306271661*x^18 + 86766409*x^17 - 521922747*x^16 - 908361628*x^15 - 996511349*x^14 - 812370789*x^13 - 254186245*x^12 + 201939997*x^11 + 552495231*x^10 + 599908087*x^9 + 487415885*x^8 + 299965902*x^7 + 148308631*x^6 + 57017372*x^5 + 17480226*x^4 + 4185804*x^3 + 922317*x^2 + 177156*x + 20349)*y^14
        + (66*x^44 - 252*x^43 + 1446*x^42 - 1298*x^41 - 1109*x^40 + 19006*x^39 - 27167*x^38 - 81805*x^37 + 458624*x^36 - 960955*x^35 + 1136959*x^34 + 3176689*x^33 - 7594180*x^32 + 23568457*x^31 - 14447432*x^30 + 11627846*x^29 + 43657097*x^28 - 82267320*x^27 + 76050883*x^26 - 100454706*x^25 - 71564004*x^24 + 5230673*x^23 - 96257621*x^22 + 98595113*x^21 + 155006189*x^20 + 204284589*x^19 + 179135181*x^18 + 45939308*x^17 - 259810168*x^16 - 406195596*x^15 - 556323479*x^14 - 418868017*x^13 - 186012792*x^12 + 89453347*x^11 + 291064456*x^10 + 340948966*x^9 + 292383092*x^8 + 186986440*x^7 + 96037564*x^6 + 37274727*x^5 + 11022934*x^4 + 2225511*x^3 + 325248*x^2 + 51205*x + 5985)*y^13
        - (220*x^42 - 830*x^41 + 3643*x^40 - 3546*x^39 - 2695*x^38 + 32725*x^37 - 24134*x^36 - 130317*x^35 + 859707*x^34 - 1312099*x^33 + 2449232*x^32 + 3079185*x^31 - 6637708*x^30 + 23717576*x^29 - 20900523*x^28 + 14535624*x^27 + 10612528*x^26 - 62166281*x^25 + 36552238*x^24 - 71597433*x^23 - 7388468*x^22 + 26611599*x^21 + 28267422*x^20 + 84564561*x^19 + 74906840*x^18 + 5192651*x^17 - 85953964*x^16 - 178891736*x^15 - 251113263*x^14 - 193840348*x^13 - 114160331*x^12 + 33422985*x^11 + 125700290*x^10 + 171374166*x^9 + 152683813*x^8 + 105317806*x^7 + 56689754*x^6 + 23533999*x^5 + 7184586*x^4 + 1470049*x^3 + 147507*x^2 + 11340*x +1330)*y^12
        + (495*x^40 - 1684*x^39 + 6127*x^38 - 4620*x^37 - 3916*x^36 + 45331*x^35 + 16467*x^34 - 161199*x^33 + 1210002*x^32 - 1514571*x^31 + 3345366*x^30 + 1514457*x^29 - 4891281*x^28 + 16998822*x^27 - 21307575*x^26 + 10979898*x^25 - 6152563*x^24 - 31293902*x^23 + 17660397*x^22 - 23720887*x^21 + 16900042*x^20 + 21323430*x^19 + 19004100*x^18 + 2190888*x^17 - 24479568*x^16 - 72382517*x^15 - 89597173*x^14 - 85222470*x^13 - 52320824*x^12 + 5914238*x^11 + 46350189*x^10 + 74467744*x^9 + 69409124*x^8 + 52501581*x^7 + 29715431*x^6 + 13527133*x^5 + 4401519*x^4 + 1011366*x^3 + 101187*x^2 + 1806*x + 210)*y^11
        - (792*x^38 - 2244*x^37 + 7128*x^36 - 2376*x^35 - 2728*x^34 + 49412*x^33 + 70890*x^32 - 160874*x^31 + 1272047*x^30 - 1546388*x^29 + 3269394*x^28 - 391824*x^27 - 3076935*x^26 + 8832198*x^25 - 15141827*x^24 + 6389674*x^23 - 6684125*x^22 - 9430541*x^21 + 7956839*x^20 - 4044110*x^19 + 6420127*x^18 - 531851*x^17 - 8199614*x^16 - 23048196*x^15 - 27557237*x^14 - 32628133*x^13 - 18563734*x^12 - 2710449*x^11 + 15530478*x^10 + 26943289*x^9 + 27689065*x^8 + 22519506*x^7 + 13651122*x^6 + 6761783*x^5 + 2395476*x^4 + 618513*x^3 + 76488*x^2 + 184*x + 21)*y^10
        + (924*x^36 - 1980*x^35 + 5841*x^34 + 1617*x^33 + 1221*x^32 + 41972*x^31 + 94063*x^30 - 136458*x^29 + 1020160*x^28 - 1363306*x^27 + 2404003*x^26 - 1317007*x^25 - 1574270*x^24 + 3301347*x^23 - 7590633*x^22 + 2826692*x^21 - 3273052*x^20 - 1970946*x^19 + 1432174*x^18 - 2169224*x^17 - 2258500*x^16 - 5993502*x^15 - 7839189*x^14 - 9793315*x^13 - 5705132*x^12 - 2347468*x^11 + 4677984*x^10 + 7951554*x^9 + 9659341*x^8 + 8096009*x^7 + 5436435*x^6 + 2847307*x^5 + 1126779*x^4 + 315141*x^3 + 50433*x^2 + 9*x + 1)*y^9
        - x^2*(792*x^32 - 1089*x^31 + 3432*x^30 + 3762*x^29 + 4816*x^28 + 28307*x^27 + 74775*x^26 - 104281*x^25 + 638092*x^24 - 982998*x^23 + 1350280*x^22 - 1169386*x^21 - 635667*x^20 + 777996*x^19 - 2800359*x^18 + 725397*x^17- 1281588*x^16 - 750864*x^15 - 666345*x^14 - 1535297*x^13 - 1912369*x^12 - 2269209*x^11 - 1573211*x^10 - 796561*x^9 + 1143783*x^8 + 1954848*x^7 + 2855568*x^6 + 2402241*x^5 + 1838500*x^4 + 988568*x^3 + 448596*x^2 + 130764*x + 27132)*y^8
        + x^2*(495*x^30 - 275*x^29 + 1518*x^28 + 3114*x^27 + 5087*x^26 + 15437*x^25 + 39990*x^24 - 72345*x^23 + 313200*x^22 - 556728*x^21 + 573408*x^20 - 648006*x^19 - 214618*x^18 + 30437*x^17 - 795313*x^16 + 8459*x^15 - 425252*x^14 - 335725*x^13 - 390008*x^12 - 429538*x^11 - 342922*x^10 - 152356*x^9 + 212799*x^8 + 421325*x^7 + 680153*x^6 + 586184*x^5 + 509540*x^4 + 278872*x^3 + 147084*x^2 + 43656*x + 11628)*y^7
        - x^2*(220*x^28 + 66*x^27 + 564*x^26 + 1518*x^25 + 2940*x^24 + 6566*x^23 + 14848*x^22 - 42577*x^21 + 118831*x^20 - 241979*x^19 + 179997*x^18 - 249662*x^17 - 64355*x^16 - 52026*x^15 - 167853*x^14 - 46473*x^13 - 88859*x^12 - 66423*x^11 - 50911*x^10 - 15403*x^9 + 34555*x^8 + 80168*x^7 + 125115*x^6 + 116997*x^5 + 110341*x^4 + 63049*x^3 + 38193*x^2 + 11577*x + 3876)*y^6
        + x^2*(66*x^26 + 78*x^25 + 189*x^24 + 477*x^23 + 991*x^22 + 1940*x^21 + 3714*x^20 - 19450*x^19 + 34147*x^18 - 78729*x^17 + 40664*x^16 - 65849*x^15 - 14574*x^14 - 17616*x^13 - 21108*x^12 - 7989*x^11 - 5127*x^10 + 486*x^9 + 6297*x^8 + 12602*x^7 + 17632*x^6 + 18435*x^5 + 17673*x^4 + 11127*x^3 + 7437*x^2 + 2388*x + 969)*y^5
        - x^2*(12*x^24 + 25*x^23 + 48*x^22 + 96*x^21 + 184*x^20 + 327*x^19 + 540*x^18 - 6477*x^17 + 7396*x^16 - 18271*x^15 + 6440*x^14 - 10943*x^13 - 1599*x^12 - 1971*x^11 - 512*x^10 + 394*x^9 + 1095*x^8 + 1573*x^7 + 1942*x^6 + 2106*x^5 + 1969*x^4 + 1435*x^3 + 1003*x^2 + 367*x + 171)*y^4
        + x^2*(x^22 + 3*x^21 + 6*x^20 + 10*x^19 + 15*x^18 + 21*x^17 + 28*x^16 - 1504*x^15 + 1200*x^14 - 2783*x^13 + 696*x^12 - 980*x^11 + 2*x^10 - 10*x^9 + 136*x^8 + 152*x^7 + 158*x^6 + 154*x^5 + 140*x^4 + 116*x^3 + 82*x^2 + 38*x + 19)*y^3
        + x^2*(231*x^13 - 132*x^12 + 249*x^11 - 38*x^10 + 35*x^9 - 9*x^8 - 8*x^7 - 7*x^6 - 6*x^5 - 5*x^4 - 4*x^3 - 3*x^2 - 2*x - 1)*y^2
        - x^11*(22*x^2 - 7*x + 10)*y
        + x^11;
r:= (x^2*y - x*y + y - 1) / (x^2*y - x);
s:=(x*y - y + 1) / (x*y);
E:=[s-r*s+1,r*s-r^2*s,r*s-r^2*s,0,0];
P:=[0,0];
